entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop used in the experiment to test fertilizer levels and tillage practices

entities.name: BEANS
entities.description: A legume crop used in the experiment to test plant population and tillage practices

entities.name: KABETE
entities.description: The site in Kenya where the agricultural trials were conducted

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: The country where the research site Kabete is located

entities.name: TIED RIDGES
entities.description: A soil water management practice used as an adaptation measure to climate change

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL TILLAGE
entities.description: A standard soil management practice used as a control in the experiment

entities.name: FERTILIZER LEVELS
entities.description: The application of varying amounts of nitrogen (0, 20, 40 kg/ha) to maize

entities.name: PLANT POPULATION
entities.description: The use of different spacing options (12, 15, 20 cm) for bean crops

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The environmental phenomenon driving the need for adaptation measures

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The goal of ensuring stable and sufficient food supply through agricultural adaptation

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of crop productivity used to evaluate the effectiveness of treatments

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: The primary nutrient applied in different levels to the maize crop

entities.name: TRIPLE SUPERPHOSPHATE
entities.description: The form of phosphate fertilizer applied at planting

entities.name: CALCIUM AMMONIUM NITRATE
entities.description: The specific chemical form of nitrogen fertilizer used in the study

entities.name: WARM AND WET ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The climatic characteristics of the Kabete site

entities.name: SHORT SEASON
entities.description: One of the two seasonal timeframes during which trials were conducted

entities.name: LONG SEASON
entities.description: One of the two seasonal timeframes during which trials were conducted

entities.name: ADAPTATION MEASURES
entities.description: Strategies like tied ridging and fertility management used to mitigate climate change impacts
